message:
chore(beads): close bd-xejg with verified evidence

Reruns the socket_ops conformance suite via rch to confirm the two
bd-xejg executors (execute_fixture_case in-process and the harness
conformance-matrix-case subprocess) still enforce expected_output
equality and host_parity in strict+hardened modes.

Result: 14/14 pass in 0.13s on /tmp/rch_target_harness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
